candidate_definition_hints.text: bluemonday: a fast golang HTML sanitizer (inspired by the OWASP Java HTML Sanitizer) to scrub user generated content of XSS
bluemonday is a HTML sanitizer implemented in Go. It is fast and highly configurable.
